title: HurleyCraft
description: A modpack that focuses on amazing terrain generation with both deep caves and tall mountains, with some magic and tech mods to keep things fresh!
body:
**HurleyCraft is a detailed modpack that has many features to enhance Minecraft!**

 
- Amazing skill trees and classes!
  
- Overhauled Vanilla dimension!
  
- New Gear (Upgraded Netherite)
  
- More Mobs and new bosses!
  
- More Natural Structures to find and loot!
  
- No need to share your loot with the Lootr mod!
  
- Magic Mods (Ars Nouvuae, Pastel, Ect.)
  
- Map and Minimap Built-in (Xaero's Map and Minimap)
  
- Waystones to help cut down long journeys back home!
  
- Trinkets to help boost you alongside your armor (Trinkets mod)
  
- Gravestones so you don't lose all of that important loot!
  
- Plus much, much more...




_Minimum ram is 8 gigs (we recommend that your computer has between 16 and 32 gigs of DDR4/DDR5, otherwise the modpack will most likely not run.)
for any issues, email the team at bfhurley@iastate.edu_
